ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or name of the coding question */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the question */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of attempts on the question */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the question on LeetCode or equivalent platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the question */,
  "example_input" TEXT /* Example input data for the question */,
  "example_output" TEXT /* Example output data for the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting the question */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being attempted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's attempt (e.g., completed, attempted) */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the user */,
  "last_attempt" TEXT /* Date of the last attempt */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the question in minutes */,
  "last_submission" TEXT /* The last code submission made by the user */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or hints provided to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the analytics belong */,
  "correct_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of correct attempts made by the user */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the user */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time taken to solve the question */,
  "average_attempts_per_session" REAL /* Average number of attempts per session */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of correct attempts */,
  "improvement_score" REAL /* Score indicating the user's improvement over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being commented on */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment has been flagged */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the rating has been flagged */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user based on attempts and correctness */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the leaderboard (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the session was created */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Login time of the user */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Logout time of the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "activity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of activities performed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
